LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER AUTOMATED MEDIA PROCESSING, INC. NOTICE OF HEARING TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PENDING PROCEEDINGS BEFORE THE CALIFORNIA LABOR COMMISSIONER. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION GRANTED. (THE COURT DOES NOT GRANT THE STAY REQUEST.) SEE PERRY VS. THOMAS (1987) 482 U.S. 483. (PETITIONER TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration And Stay Pending Proceedings Before The California Labor Commissioner
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AUTOMATED MEDIA PROCESSING, INC. Notice of Hearing to Compel Arbitration and Stay Pending Proceedings before the California Labor Commissioner. Appearances: Craig S. Miller, Esq. of Weisberg & Miller (415) 296-7070 appearing for Petitioner and moving party; George Nemiroff, Esq. Attorney at Law, (734) 657-8081 specially appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to compel arbitration granted. (The Court does not grant the stay request.) See Perry vs. Thomas (1987) 482 U.S. 483. (Petitioner to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
